faqs.vexlIsPlatform: Vexl is a platform where you can trade Bitcoin within your real world social network - your friends and friends of their friends - while staying completely anonymous - if you wish.
faqs.peopleWhomYouAllowToSee: People you allow to see your identity can view your name and profile picture, and that's it.
faqs.howCanIStayAnonymous: ЪҶШ·ЩҲШұ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШӘЩҲЩҶЩ… ЩҶШ§ШҙЩҶШ§Ші ШЁЩ…ЩҲЩҶЩ… ЩҲ ЩҮЩ…ЪҶЩҶШ§ЩҶ Ш§ШІ Vexl Ш§ШіШӘЩҒШ§ШҜЩҮ Ъ©ЩҶЩ…Шҹ
faqs.byDefaultYouParticipateInTheNetwork: By default, you participate in the network under your Vexl name and Vexl avatar that were given to you during the registration. You can only reveal your identity per a particular trade in our secure, end to end encrypted chat.
faqs.howDoIKnowWhoIAmTalkingTo: Ш§ШІ Ъ©Ш¬Ш§ ШЁЩҒЩҮЩ…Щ… ШЁШ§ Ъ©ЫҢ ШҜШ§ШұЩ… ШӯШұЩҒ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШІЩҶЩ…Шҹ
faqs.oneChallenge: One challenge with truly anonymous communications systems like Vexl is that sometimes youВ doВ need to verify the identity of the person youвҖҷre talking to! In cases like these, itвҖҷs best to use a secure secondary channel of communication to confirm with the other person that youвҖҷre both who you say you are.
faqs.vexlIsOpensource: Vexl Щ…ШӘЩҶвҖҢШЁШ§ШІЩҮ - ЩҮШұ Ъ©ШіЫҢ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШӘЩҲЩҶЩҮ ШҜЩҶШЁШ§Щ„ ШЁЪ©вҖҢШҜЩҲШұ ЫҢШ§ ЩҶЫҢШӘ Щ…Ш®ШұШЁ ШЁЪҜШұШҜЩҮ. ЩҮЩ…ЪҶЩҶЫҢЩҶ Щ…ЫҢвҖҢШӘЩҲЩҶЫҢ ЪҜШІШ§ШұШҙ ЫҢЪ© Security Audit Щ…ШіШӘЩӮЩ„ ШұЩҲ ЩҮЩ… ШЁШЁЫҢЩҶЫҢ.
faqs.vexlIsDesigned: Vexl is designed to never collect or store any sensitive information. Vexl messages and other content cannot be accessed by us or other third parties because they are always end-to-end encrypted, private, and secure. Our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy are available below.
faqs.youCanAlwaysReachOutToUs: You can always reach out to us via email: support@vexl.it. For a private comms, you can also send us an e2ee mail. Or you can meet us during your next P2P trade! рҹҳ»
